text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Which should I borrow? I think I've read this one
before... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen this book before... I thought I'd
read everything from Carrot Publications.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wait, could this be... the new release?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow... I can't believe it's already here.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I shouldn't... but maybe reading just a little
won't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, Rice Shower loses herself in the
book, forgetting the time and missing training
completely.
